#  Add a Revision to a Budget in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with the [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) and [Capital Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-capital-planning) products in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Budget tab within the Cost Tracker allows you to build project budgets with variances and anticipated costs. There are two different budgeting methods that you can use in Portfolio Financials: a _broken down budget_ , which will allow you to assign budgets to individual cost items through the Cost Tracker, and an _overall (lump sum) budget_ , where you have one amount for the entire project. If you start with overall budget, you can choose to break it down later. However, if you start with a broken down budget, you will not be able to go back to an overall budget.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Full Access' to the project or higher.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You cannot add a budget revision if there is currently a draft revision. You can either edit the existing revision on the Budget tab, or choose to discard it.
    * If you want to enter budget values by cost per square foot, a square footage value must exist for the project.


##  Steps 
Follow the relevant steps below dependent on your budget type:
  * Add a Revision to an Overall Project Budget
  * Add a Revision to a Broken Down Budget


###### To add a revision to an overall project budget:
  1. Navigate to the **Cost Tracker** section of the **Project Page**.
  2. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon on the Budget column and select **Add Budget Revision**.   
  
![Add Budget Revision](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/73d1ffc454f1e0fed54d1822d205b58a/a919733ce1e969c5262bf6b773b30e3e/add-budget-revision.png?fm=webp)  

  3. Enter a **Name** , **Value** , and a **Description** (optional) for the revised budget.
  4. Click **Submit**.


###### To add a revision to a broken down budget:
_Note:_ There must be a published budget for the project in order to add a revision.
  1. Navigate to the **Cost Tracker** section of the **Project Page**.
  2. Click the **Budget** tab.
  3. Click **Add Revision**.  
  
![Add Revision](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d5df57452164aa6f5858ade38c959574/272f4d75dcfc736346b19b8bee3ff37e/add-revision.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Enter a **Name** and **Description** (optional) for the revised budget.
  5. Click **Continue**.
  6. New _Draft_ columns appear on the budget. When you hover over a cell in these columns, a **pencil** ![Icon Rename](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a99abeb566bd076ec956fb7d7449cb3f/ecbb8ec8f5aa81b90c580771b3f830c4/icon-rename.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon is shown for a value that can be edited, and a **plus**![Icon Grey Plus Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4180883471ce57b7649cc845dcb5ede9/f27709ad7290c784c4af900fa6e0bb89/icon-grey-plus-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon is shown if a value has not been added yet.  
  
![Draft Columns Budget Revision](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cbdb5776eb3573da3fbc7a70206b69bc/8f4ec1e90d58f09a438b127a90863aa0/draft-columns-budget-revision.png?fm=webp)  

  7. Click into cells to enter revised amounts as needed. You can enter cost item budgets in terms of gross dollar amount, cost per square foot, or variance (calculated as _**current draft budget**_ minus (-) **_published budget_**).
  8. When you are finished making revisions and are ready to submit the changes, click **Submit**.  
_Note:_ If you do not want to save this budget revision, you can click **Discard.**
  9. Click **Publish** to publish the budget revision, which will automatically appear on the Cost Tracker.  
_Note:_ You cannot edit a budget revision after publishing.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Add a Budget to a Project in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/add-a-budget-to-a-project-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [View the Cost Tracker in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-the-cost-tracker-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Add a Revision to a Budget in Portfolio Financials
description: How to add a revision to a project's budget in Portfolio Financials.
